reference: Hi, my sister had an ultrasound done on her kidney for kidney stones. The person who performed the ultrasound said she had two "spots," but they didn't have a shadow, so she didn't think they were kidney stones. She advised making another appointment with her general practitioner. She also has blood in her urine. Her appointment isn't until Thursday; that's why I am asking.
text: Hi, my sister had an ultrasound done on her kidney for kidney stones. The person who performed the ultrasound said she had two spots, but they didn't have a shadow, so she didn't think they were kidney stones. She advised making another appointment with her general practitioner. She also has blood in her urine. Her appointment isn't until Thursday. That's why I am asking.
